signed_paintings.commands.toggle.culling: Culling Reduced (images can be seen from further away, but fps may be lower)
Culling Enabled (images can only be seen if the sign is in view, but fps may be better)
signed_paintings.commands.block.add.all: Adding all loaded images to block list:
signed_paintings.commands.block.remove.a: Removed all images from block list
signed_paintings.commands.block.auto.on:
Automatic blocking enabled:
- any newly loading images will be automatically blocked
- run again or relog to disable
- use "/paintings:reload all" to quickly block all nearby links
signed_paintings.commands.domain.trust.a: All %s prompted domains are now trusted

Any https:// domain is now trusted
%s

Any https:// domains are already trusted
%s
signed_paintings.commands.domain.untrust: https:// domains now need to be trusted manually
https:// domains already needed to be trusted manually
signed_paintings.commands.domain.notify:
%s to trust painting domain, make sure you know it:
%s
signed_paintings.domain.warning: IMPORTANT: trusting everything is a security risk! someone could place a sign with some malicious url and it would be loaded automatically, you have been warned!
signed_paintings.domain.warning_full:
IMPORTANT: trusting everything is a security risk!
Someone could place a sign with some malicious url and it would be loaded automatically
Only do this if you *really* need to

If you just want the convenience, run "/paintings:domain trust all_prompted" to quickly allow domains of signs youve loaded
signed_paintings.domain.warning_confirm: Yes i am *sure* i want to do this!
signed_paintings.create_trust_info:
Create a painting, and trust domain %s

%s
signed_paintings.trust_disclaimer: Other players will also need to trust this domain, to avoid this, upload the image to one of the image hosters trusted by default: imgur.com, imgbb.com, or freeimage.host
signed_paintings.disclaimer.discord: Watch out! Discord images expire after a day or two!
signed_paintings.disclaimer.format: This link probably won't work, .%s images arent supported
signed_paintings.disclaimer.image_addres: This link probably won't work, make sure you clicked "Copy Image Address"
signed_paintings.upload_change_notificat:
In-game image uploading has been removed:
- When pasting a link, you will now be prompted to trust it's domain directly
- If you think it will be more reliable/trustworthy, you can upload the image manually to an image hoster like imgur.com, imgbb.com, or freeimage.host
- For more information, click on this message, it will not be shown again
